---
id: authorization-controller-check
title: "Check authorization"
description: "Check if an organization membership has a specific permission on a resource. Supports identification by resource_id OR by resource_external_id + resource_type_slug."
sidebar_label: "Check authorization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Check authorization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/authorization/organization_memberships/{organization_membership_id}/check"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Check if an organization membership has a specific permission on a resource. Supports identification by resource_id OR by resource_external_id + resource_type_slug.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
